title: Imperial Station Bravo
content:
{{Top|canon=Gardulla's palace}} {{Structure |image=[[File:GTHpalace.jpg]] |name=Imperial Station Bravo
(formerly Gardulla's palace) |constructed= |destroyed= |type= |location=[[Tusken Canyon]], [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]]''[[Star Wars: Bounty Hunter]]'' |interest=[[Gardulla's pleasure garden]]''[[Episode I Adventures 5: The Ghostling Children]]'' |rebuilt= |builder= |height= |width= |affiliation=*[[Gardulla the Elder's criminal empire]] *[[Darth Krayt's Galactic Empire]][[Legacy (2006) 37|''Legacy'' (2006) 37]] }} '''Gardulla's palace''' was the palace and fortress owned by the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]] [[Crime lord/Legends|crime lord]] [[Gardulla Besadii the Elder/Legends|Gardulla the Elder]] on the planet [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]] during the last decades of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Old Republic]]. More than a century later, the palace became '''Imperial Station Bravo''' of [[Darth Krayt's Galactic Empire]]. ==Description== The palace had a few floors to it, with a giant arena for Gardulla's [[Canyon krayt dragon/Legends|canyon krayt dragon]]. It was populated by [[Gamorrean/Legends|Gamorreans]], [[Weequay/Legends|Weequay]], [[Trandoshan/Legends|Trandoshans]], [[Nikto/Legends|Nikto]] and other unpleasant crooks and creeps. She kept her little [[Slavery/Legends|slave]] community right in the middle of her palace, in case she needed something.''[[Episode I Adventures 7: Capture Arawynne]]'' Her throne room was huge with an opening to go into the arena, to watch horrible deaths to unlucky visitors. The fortress was also home to a [[Gardulla's pleasure garden|lush garden]] filled with plants, fountains and birds. ==History== During the period preceding the [[Invasion of Naboo/Legends|Invasion of Naboo]], Gardulla enslaved [[Ghostling]] children in her palace, including [[Princess/Legends|Princess]] [[Arawynne]], to place them in her personal pleasure garden.''[[Episode I Adventures 5: The Ghostling Children]]'' [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]] and his friends eventually disguised themselves as [[Jawa/Legends|Jawas]] and infiltrated the palace to free the children. ''[[Episode I Adventures 6: The Hunt for Anakin Skywalker]]'' [[File:Imperial_Station_Bravo.jpg|thumb|left|220px|Imperial Station Bravo]] In [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]], the [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] [[Jango Fett/Legends|Jango Fett]] traced Gardulla there after he was given the [[Bounty/Legends|bounty]] opportunity from [[Jabba Desilijic Tiure/Legends|Jabba the Hutt]], added to the fact that she knew about the [[Bando Gora/Legends|Bando Gora]]. Gardulla caught Jango and tried to feed him to her dragon. He escaped and made it to her throne room. She let her dragon in, in a would-be surprise attack on Jango. Jango took her necktie from her flab, then, after a little talk, sank his hands into her skin and pushed her to the feet of her dragon. She was chomped down by the monster in seconds. More than a century later, [[Darth Krayt's Galactic Empire]] established a military base inside the palace and named it Imperial Station Bravo. In [[137 ABY]], [[Moff/Legends|Moff]] [[Nieve Gromia]] used the base as her headquarters when she was tasked to eliminate the [[Pirate/Legends|pirates]] preying on Imperial shipments in the area. Moff Gromia employed Gardulla's pleasure garden as a private chamber. ==Appearances== *''[[Episode I Adventures 5: The Ghostling Children]]'' *''[[Episode I Adventures 6: The Hunt for Anakin Skywalker]]'' *''[[Episode I Adventures 7: Capture Arawynne]]'' *''[[Episode I Adventures 8: Trouble on Tatooine]]'' *"[[Podracing Tales]]" {{1st}} *''[[Star Wars: Bounty Hunter]]'' *[[Legacy (2006) 37|''Legacy'' (2006) 37]] *[[Legacy (2006) 40|''Legacy'' (2006) 40]] ==Sources== *{{FactFile|8|TAT 5-8|Tatooine – Mos Espa}} *{{FactFile|12|ANA 1-4|Anakin Skywalker}} {{Imo}} *''[[Star Wars: Bounty Hunter: Prima's Official Strategy Guide]]'' *{{FactFile|123|KIT 1-2|Kitster Banai}} *{{DB|character|kitster|Banai, Kitster}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} [[Category:Darth Krayt's Galactic Empire locations]] [[Category:Fortresses]] [[Category:Hutt Clan locations]] [[Category:Imperial military bases]] [[Category:Palaces]]
